    Shop Details

    Keep your shop name, location, and customer-facing information in one place so your store stays clear and trustworthy.

    Menu Management

    Add items, prices, descriptions, and photos, then update availability as your menu changes during the day.

    Portal Shortcuts

    Use these shortcuts when you need to move between the customer, vendor, and admin experience without leaving the signed-in part of the platform.
